summary.business_type: Affiliate / Content (German toddler/Kleinkind products, solo-operator, static Netlify, no ecommerce)
summary.scoring_note: 7-category weighted average per seo-audit skill spec: Technical 22%, Content 23%, On-Page 20%, Schema 10%, Performance 10%, AI Search 10%, Images 5%. On-Page derived from SXO (71) + Clustering (68) specialist blend. Images derived from image-specific findings inside Performance audit. Sitemap, Visual, Google Field Data, and Backlinks audited as supplementary categories outside the weighting formula.

top_findings.title: 23 /artikel/*.html duplicate-content URLs return HTTP 200 instead of 301-redirecting
top_findings.one_line: Netlify wildcard _redirects rule silenced by physically-existing .html files on disk

top_findings.title: Homepage outdoor-spielzeug-kleinkind thumbnail not WebP-wrapped — 618 KB wasted (97.9%)
top_findings.one_line: WebP file exists on server but not referenced in HTML; missed in the prior migration

top_findings.title: geschenke-2-jahre hero image lacks responsive srcset — mobile LCP 2.6s (Needs Improvement)
top_findings.one_line: 1600px-wide WebP served to 400px mobile viewports, 93% wasted bytes; only CWV outside Good band

top_findings.title: No Product/Offer/Review/AggregateRating schema despite star ratings and comparison tables sitewide
top_findings.one_line: ItemList items have only position/name; limits rich results and AI/LLM product entity grounding

top_findings.title: Zero YouTube, Reddit, or Wikipedia presence — biggest AI-citation brand-signal gap
top_findings.one_line: YouTube correlation with AI citation ~0.737; brand sameAs links are only LinkedIn/Instagram/Pinterest

quick_wins.action: Delete the 23 /artikel/*.html files — existing _redirects wildcard rule then fires correctly
Wrap homepage outdoor-spielzeug-kleinkind thumbnail in <picture><source type='image/webp'> — file already exists on server
Add affiliate-hinweis disclosure banner to was-wir-nicht-kaufen.html
Add SpeakableSpecification to the 2 articles missing it (reisespielzeug, spielzeug-balkon)
Add 3-5 internal links to /artikel/nachhaltiges-spielzeug-siegel (pos 17.8, 12 impressions, 0 clicks) and /artikel/spielzeug-12-18-monate (pos 14.6, 10 impressions, 0 clicks)

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: Clean SSR HTML, no JS dependency — fully crawlable without headless browser
Full modern security header set (HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options)
HTTPS + www canonicalization correct (single-hop 301s)
Canonical tags present and self-referential on all sampled pages
robots.txt: explicit Allow for all major AI crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, OAI-SearchBot, Google-Extended, anthropic-ai, cohere-ai, Applebot-Extended)
No stray noindex on any canonical content URL
IndexNow key file live; IndexNow submission script available

findings.title: 23 /artikel/*.html URLs return HTTP 200 (not 301) due to Netlify wildcard redirect precedence bug
findings.description: Physical .html files exist on disk for all 23 articles. Netlify serves existing static files before evaluating wildcard _redirects rules, so the rule '/artikel/*.html /artikel/:splat 301!' never fires. Canonical tags are correctly set but do not prevent crawl-budget dilution or independent indexation of these duplicate paths.
findings.recommendation: Delete all 23 /artikel/*.html files from the repo and push. The existing wildcard rule will then correctly 301 them. Alternatively, add explicit per-URL exact-match entries (like the working root-level pattern) if files must remain on disk for some reason.

findings.title: No automated regression test for _redirects wildcard-vs-static-file precedence
findings.description: No post-deploy smoke test checks redirect correctness, allowing the Critical finding above to persist undetected.
findings.recommendation: Add a lightweight post-deploy script that curls every _redirects source pattern's sample URLs and asserts expected status codes.

findings.title: Single fixed-resolution image srcset, no breakpoints
findings.description: WebP conversions serve one resolution regardless of viewport; mobile users download the same bytes as desktop.
findings.recommendation: Generate 2-3 width variants per hero/content image and add sizes attribute; see also Performance Findings 1-2 which are the critical instances.

findings.title: 4 chrome images (logo, avatar) lack explicit loading attribute
findings.description: Cosmetic consistency issue only; no measurable CWV impact.
findings.recommendation: Add loading='eager' for clarity on non-LCP above-fold chrome assets.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: Genuine, differentiated first-hand anecdotes per article (Aus unserer Elternpraxis), not copy-pasted
Explicit AI-use disclosure on ueber-uns.html — rare and valuable post-Sept-2025-QRG
Substantive methodology page (bewertungsmethode.html, 15.7 KB) with named sources, scoring criteria, update cadence
Consistent prominent affiliate disclosure (343 rel=sponsored instances), .affiliate-hinweis banner on all articles except was-wir-nicht-kaufen (see finding)
Strong author entity markup (Boris Nazarov Person node, stable @id, knowsAbout, sameAs)
Word counts 1,186-4,190 words/article; no thin pages
AI citation structure: Kurzantwort boxes + FAQPage schema + speakable — 85/100 citation readiness
Honest opinionated was-wir-nicht-kaufen.html with sourced claims (WHO, EU Directive, Hart & Risley 1995)

findings.title: 18/23 articles share an identical same-day dateModified timestamp (2026-06-26) suggesting bulk/scripted update
findings.description: Looks like manufactured freshness — contradicts stated per-article review cadence. Google QRG explicitly flags this pattern.
findings.recommendation: Only update dateModified when substantive content actually changes. Decouple CSS/template cache-busting from schema dateModified.

findings.title: was-wir-nicht-kaufen.html missing affiliate-hinweis banner despite containing a sponsored link
findings.description: Site's own stated policy requires a disclosure banner on every article with affiliate links. Legal/trust risk.
findings.recommendation: Add the standard .affiliate-hinweis block near the top of this article.

findings.title: Templated 6-step 'So wählst du aus' list duplicated near-verbatim across 7 articles
findings.description: Only age placeholder differs across articles — a recognizable template pattern QRG flags as lower-quality.
findings.recommendation: Rewrite with age-specific examples per article; remove or merge boilerplate safety bullets.

findings.title: Inconsistent author byline on weihnachtsgeschenke-kleinkind.html
findings.description: Uses minimal one-line byline instead of the rich .artikel-autor-line credibility card used on every other article.
findings.recommendation: Apply standard .artikel-autor-line component to this article.

findings.title: Author has no formal child-development credentials (honestly disclosed)
findings.description: Acceptable per QRG for lived-experience creators if claims are sourced; caps achievable Expertise sub-score.
findings.recommendation: Consider adding a named expert reviewer credit on 2-3 safety-heavy articles.

categories.name: On-Page SEO
categories.scoring_note: Blended score from SXO specialist (71/100) and Content Clustering specialist (68/100). Covers page-intent matching, internal linking, content architecture, and search-experience alignment.
what_works: Listicle/ranked format correctly matches German commercial-investigation SERP expectations
Kurzantwort + FAQ schema + speakable at top of every article — serves time-pressed mobile persona
Decision-shortcut 'Wenn du nur eins kaufen willst' box on spielzeug-unter-20-euro
Age cluster with prev/next interlinking and on-page intent-disambiguation text
Gift cluster mirrors age cluster; seasonal/situational spokes interlink tightly
Internal cross-linking discipline: articles link to was-wir-nicht-kaufen, age-band articles, hubs

findings.title: Homepage mixes navigational and content-hub roles with 9+ competing entry points above the fold
findings.description: Decision fatigue for first-time visitors; no single clear next action. Long editorial essay overlaps bewertungsmethode.html.
findings.recommendation: Reduce to: hero with single CTA → age-quick-nav → 3 situational tiles → top 3 articles. Move editorial essay to bewertungsmethode.html.

findings.title: No dedicated hub for 'Sicheres/nachhaltiges Spielzeug' and 'Entwicklung/Motorik' clusters
findings.description: 5+ topically related articles rely entirely on incidental contextual links; no shared hub, no ItemList schema, no nav entry point.
findings.recommendation: Build /sicheres-spielzeug/ and /entwicklung-spielzeug/ hubs with ItemList schema and bidirectional hub-spoke links.

findings.title: No purchase CTA visible above the fold on article money pages (any viewport)
findings.description: First 'Preis prüfen' buy-box appears 2,200-2,800px down on mobile. Unfixed since the prior (2026-06-17) audit.
findings.recommendation: Add compact 'Top-Empfehlung: X — Preis prüfen' strip immediately below H1/dek on all commercial articles.

findings.title: Commercial articles lack scannable side-by-side comparison table
findings.description: German SERPs for these query types typically reward a comparison table above the product boxes. Hub page has one; money pages don't.
findings.recommendation: Add compact table near top of spielzeug-unter-20-euro and geschenke-2-jahre: Produkt | Alter | Preis | Stärke | Link.

findings.title: Moderate cannibalization risk between age-guides and gift-guides at 2/3-year marks
findings.description: Heavy product overlap between spielzeug-2-jahre/geschenke-2-jahre and spielzeug-3-jahre/geschenke-3-jahre.
findings.recommendation: Keep both (intent differs) but cap product overlap at 40%; enforce stricter developmental vs. occasion framing.

findings.title: Gift article underserves the grandparent/relative 'uncertain gift-giver' persona
findings.description: geschenke-2-jahre assumes parent-level child-context knowledge throughout; large share of gift-query traffic is relatives.
findings.recommendation: Add short 'Du kennst das Kind nicht so gut?' callout near top pointing to Geschenk-Finder and was-wir-nicht-kaufen.

findings.title: Homepage age-grid duplicates spielzeug-nach-alter hub almost entirely
findings.description: Two near-identical 6-card age grids on different URLs fragment internal-link equity and weaken hub authority.
findings.recommendation: Condense homepage age section to 3-4 cards pointing to the hub; consolidate internal links sitewide to hub URL.

findings.title: Missing high-intent narrower age-segment content (9, 15, 24, 30 Monate)
findings.description: Competitor pages (kita.de, selecta-spielzeug.de) target these narrower bands; Pikler-Dreieck age-related queries uncovered.
findings.recommendation: Add one 'Spielzeug-Meilensteine: 9, 15, 24, 30 Monate' FAQ-style spoke; add standalone 'Pikler-Dreieck: Ab wann sinnvoll?' under Entwicklung hub.

categories.name: Schema & Structured Data
what_works: 100% valid JSON-LD syntax across all 23 articles + 6 root/hub pages — zero json.loads() errors
Consistent @id reuse: Organization and author Person use the same stable @id everywhere
Complete ISO 8601 date hygiene on all 23 articles (datePublished/dateModified both present, no inversions)
Canonical/mainEntityOfPage/Article.url alignment verified on all spot-checked pages
FAQPage site-wide with matching visible FAQ accordion content (21/23 also have SpeakableSpecification)

findings.title: No Product/Offer/Review/AggregateRating schema despite review-style content sitewide
findings.description: Every article has visible star ratings and ranked comparison tables; none is represented in JSON-LD as Product/Offer/Review/AggregateRating. Existing ItemList items have only position/name — no url, image, or offers.
findings.recommendation: Add Product nodes with nested aggregateRating and review for top-ranked items per comparison article. Start with motorikspielzeug-test, spielzeug-unter-20-euro, duplo-vergleich. See example markup in findings/schema.md.

findings.title: Comparison-table ItemList items carry no url property
findings.description: Hub-page ItemLists correctly have url on each ListItem; in-article comparison ItemLists don't, making them dead-ends for crawlers and LLMs.
findings.recommendation: Add outbound affiliate url to each ListItem, or nest a minimal Product node as ListItem.item.

findings.title: FAQPage no longer produces Google rich results (retired May 2026)
findings.description: No SERP feature benefit; retained for AI/LLM citation value — correct decision, no change needed.
findings.recommendation: Keep as-is; do not expand for SERP SEO purposes.

findings.title: Organization node lacks founder link to author Person entity
findings.description: Boris is positioned as founder/editor; adding founder @id strengthens the entity graph.
findings.recommendation: Optional: add 'founder': {'@id': 'https://kleinkind-welt.de/ueber-uns#boris'} to index.html Organization node.

categories.name: Performance (CWV)
what_works: CLS = 0 everywhere (all images sized, zero custom web fonts — system font stack)
TBT = 0ms everywhere (minimal JS: only Plausible analytics ~3.3KB)
Desktop LCP 0.4-0.6s (well within Good) on all 4 tested pages
Mobile LCP Good on 3 of 4 pages: homepage 1.7s, spielzeug-unter-20-euro 1.7s, spielzeug-nach-alter 1.1s
Server TTFB 1-5ms (Netlify Edge, cache: hit) — excellent
Homepage hero: correct responsive srcset + fetchpriority + preload link (textbook LCP optimization)
DOM size healthy: 395 elements, depth 9 on homepage

findings.title: Homepage outdoor-spielzeug-kleinkind thumbnail not WebP-wrapped (618 KB wasted)
findings.description: WebP file exists on server but the HTML references only the JPG. 97.9% wasted bytes per PSI. Not the LCP element but significant payload.
findings.recommendation: Add <picture><source type='image/webp'> wrapper matching the pattern used on other card thumbnails.

findings.title: geschenke-2-jahre hero: no responsive srcset — mobile LCP 2.6s (Needs Improvement)
findings.description: Only CWV metric outside Good band sitewide. 1600px WebP served to 400px viewport, 93% wasted. Directly causes the LCP regression.
findings.recommendation: Generate 480w/768w/1600w WebP variants; update srcset and imagesrcset on preload link. Expected: LCP drops to 1.5-1.8s.

findings.title: Sitewide autor-boris.webp avatar oversized for 40x40px display (99% wasted bytes)
findings.description: 27 KB served for a 40x40px circle; compounds on every article view.
findings.recommendation: Re-export at 80x80px for 2x density — should be 1-2 KB.

findings.title: css/style.css is render-blocking and unminified (~22% recoverable)
findings.description: Only render-blocking resource sitewide; 54-266ms wastedMs depending on page. Not currently preventing Good LCP.
findings.recommendation: Minify in deploy pipeline; consider inline critical CSS as a follow-up.

findings.title: No CrUX field data available (insufficient Chrome traffic)
findings.description: Expected at this traffic level; all CWV scores above are Lighthouse lab data.
findings.recommendation: Re-check CrUX eligibility periodically as traffic grows.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness
what_works: Full AI-crawler allowlist in robots.txt (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, OAI-SearchBot, Google-Extended, anthropic-ai, cohere-ai, Applebot-Extended)
Static SSR HTML — zero CSR risk for non-JS-executing AI crawlers
llms.txt already exists with RSL 1.0 licensing (rare for site this size) — 27/30 sitemap URLs listed
Kurzantwort + FAQPage + SpeakableSpecification site-wide (21/23 articles) — strong direct-answer architecture
Author entity: stable @id reused across all 23 articles, resolves to full Person node
Per-article sourcing boxes cite named external sources (not vague 'studies show')

findings.title: Zero YouTube, Reddit, or Wikipedia presence anywhere in brand footprint
findings.description: YouTube mention correlation with AI citation likelihood ~0.737 (highest known signal). sameAs links are only LinkedIn/Instagram/Pinterest (low AI-citation correlation).
findings.recommendation: Publish 3-5 YouTube videos on top-recommended products; participate authentically in r/Elternsein; pursue citation on relevant German Wikipedia articles. Multi-month initiative — start now.

findings.title: Kurzantwort boxes consistently 15-20% short of optimal AI-citation window (109-128 words vs 134-167 target)
findings.description: Two articles are well under: spielzeug-balkon-kleinkind (55 words) and outdoor-spielzeug-kleinkind (80 words).
findings.recommendation: Expand each box by one concrete source-backed sentence. Prioritize the two shortest articles first.

findings.title: H2/H3 headings outside FAQ block are label-style, not question-style
findings.description: Question-form headings are a known AI Overview matching lever; benefit currently confined to FAQ section only.
findings.recommendation: Reframe 2-3 query-relevant H2s per comparison article into question form with a direct-answer sentence immediately below.

findings.title: 2/23 articles missing SpeakableSpecification (reisespielzeug, spielzeug-balkon)
findings.description: Breaks template consistency; excludes these pages from voice/AI answer surfacing.
findings.recommendation: Add standard speakable block to both articles' Article JSON-LD (~5 min per page).

findings.title: llms.txt 3 URLs behind sitemap
findings.description: 27 links vs 30 sitemap URLs; newer articles not yet added.
findings.recommendation: Diff and add missing 3 URLs; add sync check to publishing checklist.

categories.name: Images
categories.scoring_note: Derived from image-specific findings inside Performance and Visual audits. The WebP migration is real and mostly correct but incomplete: one homepage thumbnail missed, conversions lack responsive srcset for mobile, avatar oversized.
what_works: ~70% file-size reduction confirmed on sampled hero image (WebP 107KB vs JPG 358KB)
All sampled tags carry explicit width/height — good CLS protection
Hero/LCP images correctly carry fetchpriority='high' and are not lazy-loaded
Homepage hero: correct responsive picture/source/srcset with 640w/1200w/1920w WebP variants

findings.title: Homepage outdoor-spielzeug-kleinkind card: bare JPG, no wrapper
findings.description: 618 KB wasted per homepage load (97.9%). WebP already exists on server.
findings.recommendation: Add <picture><source type='image/webp'> wrapper referencing existing .webp file.

findings.title: geschenke-2-jahre hero: WebP converted but no responsive srcset — 93% mobile bytes wasted
findings.description: Single 1600px variant served to 400px mobile viewport; directly causes mobile LCP Needs Improvement.
findings.recommendation: Generate and reference 480w/768w WebP variants with srcset/sizes.

findings.title: autor-boris.webp: 27 KB for a 40x40px display (99% wasted)
findings.description: Sitewide impact on every article page.
findings.recommendation: Re-export at 80x80px; should reduce to 1-2 KB.

findings.title: Remaining articles not individually checked for JPG-only tags outside
findings.description: Only 4 pages tested by Performance audit; other articles may have the same gap as the homepage thumbnail.
findings.recommendation: Run a sitewide grep for to find any remaining unconverted images.

categories.name: Sitemap
categories.scoring_note: Supplementary category outside 7-category weighting. Excellent structure; minor lastmod drift.
what_works: Zero orphan pages; every internal href maps to a sitemap URL
Zero dead/stale URLs in sitemap — all 30 loc entries map to existing files
Noindex pages (datenschutz, impressum, freebies/*, newsletter-bestaetigt, 404) correctly excluded
Canonical alignment confirmed on all sampled pages
Hub-and-spoke architecture fully reflected; bidirectional linking confirmed

findings.title: lastmod values manually drifted out of sync with actual git history
findings.description: e.g., pages listed as 2026-06-29 but most recent commit was 2026-06-30.
findings.recommendation: Automate lastmod from git log -1 --format=%aI at deploy time, or add a deploy checklist step.

findings.title: priority and changefreq tags present but ignored by Google
findings.description: Add bytes and maintenance burden for zero ranking benefit.
findings.recommendation: Safe to remove; re-validate XML after.

categories.name: Visual / Mobile Rendering
categories.scoring_note: Supplementary category. Screenshots in findings/screenshots/ (5 viewports × 3 pages + mobile full-page). Playwright/Chromium headless.
what_works: No horizontal overflow at any breakpoint (375/768/1366/1920px) on any tested page
Mobile text-clipping issue from prior 2026-06-17 audit is resolved
Homepage above-fold: H1 + both CTAs visible without scroll on all viewports
Zero console errors across all 12 page/viewport combinations
No cookie-consent banner intercepting viewport on first load
Article above-fold trust sequence: breadcrumb → hero → H1 → author card → Kurzantwort

findings.title: No purchase CTA visible above fold on article money pages (any viewport)
findings.description: First 'Preis prüfen' box appears 2,200-2,800px down on mobile. Unfixed since prior audit.
findings.recommendation: Add compact 'Top-Empfehlung: X — Preis prüfen' strip immediately below H1/dek.

findings.title: Hub page: no age-segment quick links visible above fold on mobile
findings.description: Core routing function of the hub is hidden below the fold; delays primary user task.
findings.recommendation: Add compact jump-nav (chips/pills for age ranges) directly under the intro text.

findings.title: 13/21 homepage images reported naturalWidth: 0 at measurement time (likely lazy-load artifact)
findings.description: Most likely timing artifact from lazy-loading, but should be confirmed with a full-scroll test. Separately confirms outdoor-spielzeug-kleinkind.jpg still served as oversized JPG.
findings.recommendation: Re-test with full page scroll to confirm no broken images; fix the JPG gap per Performance Finding 1.

findings.title: Desktop/tablet nav links only 18px tall — below 44px touch-target guideline
findings.description: Mobile nav (hamburger) is unaffected; risk is tablet/touch-laptop users seeing the desktop nav layout.
findings.recommendation: Increase CSS padding on nav <a> elements to reach 44px tappable height.

categories.name: Google Field Data
categories.scoring_note: Supplementary category. Reflects early-stage traffic, not a technical defect. GSC URL Inspection batch incomplete (17/30 ran).

findings.title: GSC URL Inspection batch incomplete — no per-URL indexation status available
findings.description: 17/30 URLs had inspection requests sent; output not captured. Re-run needed for full indexation picture.
findings.recommendation: Re-run gsc_inspect.py --batch to completion.

findings.title: /artikel/spielzeug-3-jahre.html legacy URL still generating GSC impressions
findings.description: Non-canonical .html variant receiving 1 impression at position 42, separate from canonical. Corroborates Technical Critical Finding #1.
findings.recommendation: Resolved by deleting physical .html files (Technical Phase 1, item 1.1).

categories.name: Backlinks
categories.score_note: Insufficient data (Tier 0, Common Crawl only). Directionally near-zero; expected for domain age.

findings.title: Zero discoverable backlinks — domain not yet in Common Crawl web graph
findings.description: Not proof of literally zero links, only proof CC hasn't indexed any yet. Expected for a young domain. Clean slate (no toxic links).
findings.recommendation: Re-check in 2-3 months. Add Moz free-tier API key for real DA/spam baseline (Tier 1, €0).

findings.title: No backlink-building activity beyond Pinterest (nofollow only)
findings.description: Pinterest is nofollow, traffic-referral only. A small number of real external links would accelerate GSC discovery and crawl frequency for new hub pages.
findings.recommendation: Start German parenting blog outreach (guest posts, source contributions, roundup-list inclusion). No paid links.

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Delete all 23 /artikel/*.html files — git rm artikel/*.html && git push
Add <picture><source type='image/webp'> wrapper around homepage outdoor-spielzeug-kleinkind thumbnail
Generate 480w/768w WebP variants for geschenke-2-jahre hero and add responsive srcset
Add .affiliate-hinweis disclosure banner to was-wir-nicht-kaufen.html
Re-run GSC URL Inspection batch to completion (gsc_inspect.py --batch, 30 URLs)

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Add Product/Offer/Review/AggregateRating schema to top 3 comparison articles (motorikspielzeug-test, spielzeug-unter-20-euro, duplo-vergleich)
Add above-fold compact 'Top-Empfehlung' CTA strip to all commercial article pages
Add comparison table near top of spielzeug-unter-20-euro and geschenke-2-jahre
Re-export autor-boris.webp at 80x80px (~1-2 KB vs current 27 KB)
Strengthen internal linking to nachhaltiges-spielzeug-siegel and spielzeug-12-18-monate (3-5 new contextual links each)
Automate sitemap.xml lastmod from git log; optionally strip priority/changefreq tags
Add SpeakableSpecification to reisespielzeug-kleinkind.html and spielzeug-balkon-kleinkind.html
Sync llms.txt with sitemap (add 3 missing URLs; add publishing checklist step)

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: Build /sicheres-spielzeug/ hub (Holzspielzeug vs. Plastik, Nachhaltige Siegel, Was wir nicht kaufen) with ItemList schema and bidirectional links
Build /entwicklung-spielzeug/ hub (Motorikspielzeug-Test, Sprache fördern, Montessori-Spielzeug) with ItemList schema and bidirectional links
Expand short Kurzantwort boxes to 134-167 words — prioritize spielzeug-balkon (55 words) and outdoor-spielzeug (80 words)
Reframe 2-3 H2s per comparison article to question form with direct-answer sentence
Simplify homepage: single dominant CTA, condensed age-section, move editorial essay
Differentiate age-guide vs. gift-guide content at 2/3-year marks (max 40% product overlap)
Add grandparent/relative 'Du kennst das Kind nicht so gut?' callout to geschenke-2-jahre.html
Fix dateModified policy: only update on genuine content changes, not template/CSS bumps
Rewrite 'So wählst du aus' section with age-specific examples per article
Start German parenting blog outreach (5-10 blogs; guest posts and source contributions)
Add expert reviewer credit to spielzeug-0-6-monate, was-wir-nicht-kaufen, nachhaltiges-spielzeug-siegel if a credentialed reviewer can be found
Add author byline .artikel-autor-line component to weihnachtsgeschenke-kleinkind.html

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: Add post-deploy smoke test checking _redirects status codes for all source patterns
Re-run Common Crawl backlink check every 2-3 months; add Moz free-tier API key for Tier 1 data
Monitor CrUX eligibility as traffic grows; re-validate lab CWV against field data when available
Track GSC position for spielzeug-unter-20-euro, nachhaltiges-spielzeug-siegel, spielzeug-12-18-monate weekly
Begin YouTube video publication on top-recommended products (3-5 videos, embed on corresponding articles)
Participate authentically in r/Elternsein and r/Mamastube over time
Pursue Wikipedia citation on relevant German pages (Montessori-Spielzeug, Kleinkind) where genuinely additive
Increase desktop/tablet nav link CSS padding to 44px tappable height
